vibe: Warm, inviting, sensory. Let food/place imagery shine while maintaining functional clarity.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headers (text-4xl+). Never use 'Inter' for headings.

body.usage: Use leading-relaxed for body text. Perfect for dense UI like admin dashboard.

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl/6xl. Do not exceed 2 tailwind steps for heading-to-subtitle jumps. Overlines must be uppercase + tracking-[0.2em] + text-xs.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for luxurious spacing on user-facing pages.

marketing_pages.style: The 'Tetris' Grid for promos. Asymmetric. Mix spans like col-span-8 row-span-2 and col-span-4.

admin_dashboard.style: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense and compact. Every pixel utilized with h-full.

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for user-facing elements, rounded-lg for admin dashboard widgets.

components.buttons: Always explicit text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#C64A26] hover:text-white). No generic default borders.
components.cards: Cardless rectangular vibe or subtle roundness. Don't rely solely on shadows; use a sharp 1px border-border to ground them.
components.inputs_forms: Use Shadcn Form components but heavily customize. Remove the 'Vercel-look'. Focus rings must use the primary brand color (#E05D36).
components.header_nav: Visible navigation bar required. Use Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-[#E8E6E1]) if sticky. z-50 mandatory.
components.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based). Example: data-testid='checkout-submit-button'.

hero_background.description: Warm restaurant interior. Use with bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.

icons_and_motion.icon_library: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) for a high-end app feel. Install @phosphor-icons/react if using it.
icons_and_motion.motion: Use framer-motion for page transitions and layout animations. Keep it subtle (0.2s-0.3s ease). Hover states must feel responsive but not erratic.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the specified colors and fonts. Import Cabinet Grotesk and Manrope in the global CSS.
2. Implement a unified layout with a sticky glassmorphism header.
3. Build the user-facing app (home, search, cart, checkout) focusing on large appetizing imagery, rounded-2xl cards, and generous whitespace.
4. Build the Admin Dashboard using a separate, denser layout route (/admin). Use 1px borders, smaller border-radius (rounded-lg), and compact spacing for data density.
5. Do NOT use standard Shadcn card defaults; customize them to match the border and shadow properties defined here.
6. Include data-testid on all links, buttons, and form inputs.
